A [[Species/Legends|species]] known as '''ursi''' was domesticated at some point and the creatures were frequently kept as house pets by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]],<ref name="GCG" /> a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species native to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> The Bothans viewed the creatures to be cuddly. The Bothans also used "Ursi" as a first name for some [[Gender/Legends|female]] members.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ursi was first mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]]. The book included a description of the species in a table of Bothan female names.<ref name="GCG" />
